name: CellarTracker → Supabase Wine Inventory (Nightly) - Single Embedding Batch

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => ({
  ct_barcode: i.json.ct_barcode,
  ct_iwine: i.json.ct_iwine,
  wine: i.json.wine,
  vintage: i.json.vintage,
  producer: i.json.producer,
  wine_type: i.json.wine_type,
  color: i.json.color,
  varietal: i.json.varietal,
  appellation: i.json.appellation,
  region: i.json.region,
  country: i.json.country,
  locale: i.json.locale,
  location: i.json.location,
  bin: i.json.bin,
  purchase_price: i.json.purchase_price,
  valuation: i.json.valuation,
  drink_from: i.json.drink_from,
  drink_to: i.json.drink_to,
  ct_score: i.json.ct_score,
  my_score: i.json.my_score,
  my_notes: i.json.my_notes,
  note_date: i.json.note_date,
  removed_at: null,
  last_synced_at: i.json.last_synced_at,
  raw_ct_row: i.json.raw_ct_row,
  embedding: i.json.embedding
}));

return [{ json: { rows, count: rows.length } }];
